method: Prices from Inceptron's own public OpenAI-compatible catalog API https://api.inceptron.io/v1/models (no auth; pricing.prompt / pricing.completion in USD per token x 1e6; input_cache_reads for cache tier), cross-checked against OpenRouter endpoint data (provider_name=='Inceptron'). The public API lists 4 priced text LLMs (unchanged count vs 2026-07-01; GLM 5.1 has NOT returned). Change vs 2026-07-01: GLM 5.2 dropped to 0.90/2.86 (was 1.15/3.62) and Kimi K2.7 Code dropped to 0.75/3.15 (was 0.85/3.50). Kimi K2.6 0.66/3.41 and MiniMax M2.5 0.15/0.90 both unchanged. OpenRouter Inceptron endpoints confirm Kimi K2.7 Code (0.75/3.15) and Kimi K2.6 (0.66/3.41) exactly; GLM 5.2 and MiniMax M2.5 currently have no live Inceptron OpenRouter endpoint, so native api.inceptron.io is authoritative for those two. HQ Sweden (SE), datacenters Finland (FI) per OpenRouter provider metadata.

models.notes: fp4 quant, 1.05M context. Cache read $0.17/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.2. Native api.inceptron.io 2026-07-06: in $0.90 / out $2.86 (DOWN from 1.15/3.62 on 2026-07-01). No live Inceptron OpenRouter endpoint to cross-check currently. | Re-verified 2026-07-09 vs native API.

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.15/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.75 / out 3.15). DOWN from 0.85/3.50 on 2026-07-01. | Re-verified 2026-07-09 vs native API.

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.14/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.66 / out 3.41). Unchanged vs 2026-07-01.

fp8 quant, 196K context. Cache read $0.05/1M. Inceptron model id MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5. No live Inceptron OpenRouter endpoint currently; native api.inceptron.io authoritative. Unchanged vs 2026-07-01.
